note: Recipe = proven compatible combo of section surface + background (L13) + transition (L14) + motion (L12). NOT a page template, NOT a React component. Authored by visual-layer-forge, normalized into this schema + registered here by component-library-preparer. A recipe is `ready` ONLY when all member backgrounds/transitions/motion are themselves `ready` AND registration.status=completed.

field_mapping_visual_layer_forge.note: visual-layer-forge §8.4 authors {id,name,sequence,best_for,avoid_when,responsive}; preparer normalizes avoid_when->unsuitable_for, derives dependencies/* from sequence, aggregates mobile_fallback/reduced_motion worst-case from member contracts, and adds purpose/source/registration/dependency_status/readiness.

surface_ownership_note: Page-level recipes that depend on bg-shared-page-grid / tr-grid-continuation are blocked-by-surface-ownership until Lab sections support a transparent/inherit surface (unblock: component-forge -> transparent-or-inherit-surface-api). Such recipes are registered but never handed to Page Orchestrator as `ready`.
